case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. GREGORY PATTERSON et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-27-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE GREGORY PATTERSON FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
